channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Buckingham Palace received archived emails showing Prince Andrew shared confidential information as trade envoy
item.description: Court documents reveal that Buckingham Palace received an archive of approximately 30,000 emails in 2020, which included information showing that Prince Andrew shared confidential government briefings...

item.title: Government Disbands Utumishi Girls Academy Board Following Deadly Dormitory Fire and Safety Violations
item.description: The Kenyan government has dissolved the Board of Management of Utumishi Girls Academy after preliminary investigations into a deadly dormitory fire revealed serious violations of school safety regulat...

item.title: Heavy rain disrupts traffic as Lahore records notable rainfall acrossCity
item.description: Heavy rainfall swept across Lahore, with the heaviest downpour observed in Nishtar Town. Data from the Water and Sanitation Agency (Wasa) show varying rainfall across several neighborhoods, including ...

item.title: Becky Barnicoat Cartoon Highlights the Challenges of Ageing
item.description: The Guardian's latest cartoon by Becky Barnicoat takes a humorous yet poignant look at the realities of growing older. Through her distinctive style, Barnicoat explores the everyday struggles and smal...

item.title: Gabriel DiCecco Convicted of Manslaughter in Friend's Death
item.description: Gabriel DiCecco has been found guilty of manslaughter in the death of his close friend, marking the conclusion of a high-profile trial in Barrie, Ontario. The case revolved around the circumstances th...

item.title: US and South Korea Discuss Commander’s Remarks That Angered China
item.description: South Korea and the United States have entered discussions regarding recent statements made by US Forces Korea (USFK) commander, Xavier Brunson, which provoked strong criticism from China. In a podcas...

item.title: Elephant calf safely rescued after falling into 15-foot water tank near Anthiyur village
item.description: A young elephant calf that had strayed out of the forest in search of food was successfully rescued after it accidentally fell into a water storage tank at Mutharasan Kuttai village near Anthiyur in T...

item.title: Heavy rainfall brings partial relief and drainage challenges in Lahore
item.description: Heavy rain lashed several parts of Lahore on Saturday, providing some relief from the ongoing heat but also creating drainage challenges across the city. According to data from the Water and Sanitatio...

item.title: Water park guests try ‘poker face’ challenge featured on Patrol on the Go
item.description: This ABS-CBN News lifestyle feature from the segment “Patrol on the GO” highlights a light-hearted activity held at a water park, where guests were invited to take part in a playful “poker face challe...

item.title: French thinker Edgar Morin dies at 104, leaving legacy of philosophy and documentary innovation
item.description: France don lose one of its most respected intellectual figures, Edgar Morin, wey die at the age of 104. Morin, born in Paris in 1921 to Jewish immigrant parents, lived a long life shaped by philosophy...

item.title: A review of the Changan Deepal S07 electric SUV and its value in South Africa
item.description: The article reviews the Changan Deepal S07, a fully electric SUV introduced by Chinese manufacturer Changan into the South African market. The brand, which has sold over 30 million vehicles globally a...

item.title: Frida Amani recognised for outstanding environmental conservation efforts at NEMC 40th anniversary celebrations
item.description: Tanzanian hip hop artiste and environmental activist Frida Amani has been recognised with an Environmental Conservation Award during the 40th anniversary celebrations of the National Environment Manag...

item.title: US Defence Chief Urges Asian Allies to Boost Military Spending Amid China's Expansion
item.description: United States Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has called on Asian allies to strengthen their own military capabilities in response to China's rapid military expansion, warning that a Pacific dominated ...

item.title: US Defence Secretary highlights India’s growing military strength and defence modernisation
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has praised India’s growing military strength and ongoing defence modernisation, stating that India is becoming a key anchor in the Indo-Pacific security architecture...

item.title: Weekly Horoscope Forecast: Guidance for June 1–7
item.description: This week’s horoscope highlights the value of perspective, patience, and steady progress across various areas of life. Relationships benefit from calm communication and consistent effort rather than d...

item.title: Trump withdraws Kennedy Center takeover and signals transfer of oversight to Congress following court ruling
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that he will transfer control of the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts back to Congress after a federal judge ruled aspects of his takeover effor...

item.title: Al Jazeera report says Pakistan expanded diplomatic influence despite India's efforts to isolate it
item.description: An Al Jazeera report has argued that Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's long-running effort to diplomatically isolate Pakistan has not achieved its intended objectives. The assessment comes nearly ...

item.title: Podcast Examines Expo 86's Lasting Impact on Vancouver's Growth and Development
item.description: Marking the 40th anniversary of Expo 86, the National Post's 10/3 podcast explores the lasting influence of the world's fair on Vancouver and its evolution into a major international city. The episode...

item.title: Weekly South African arts, theatre and events guide for early June 2026
item.description: This weekly “What’s On” guide highlights a range of cultural, theatrical, documentary, and lifestyle events taking place across South Africa in early June 2026. In Cape Town, the Artscape Theatre Cent...

item.title: Kenya partners with Google to use AI and data analytics to modernise and grow its tourism sector
item.description: Kenya has entered into a strategic partnership with Google Kenya aimed at transforming its tourism sector through the use of artificial intelligence, big data, and advanced digital tools. The initiati...
